records.m_Talk_ENG: Krgh!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Krgh!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Krgh!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Professor Birmingham. Why are you saying things you don't even believe?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Professor Birmingham. Why are you saying things you don't even believe?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Professor Birmingham. Why are you saying things you don't even believe?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why would you lie like that...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why would you lie like that...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why would you lie like that...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's no lie. What you're doing is nothing more than playing knights while turning your back on reality.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's no lie. What you're doing is nothing more than playing knights while turning your back on reality.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's no lie. What you're doing is nothing more than playing knights while turning your back on reality.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Or are you still clinging to that hollow hope that you can save everyone?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Or are you still clinging to that hollow hope that you can save everyone?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Or are you still clinging to that hollow hope that you can save everyone?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wake up. This is reality. There is no such thing as a happy ending for all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wake up. This is reality. There is no such thing as a happy ending for all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wake up. This is reality. There is no such thing as a happy ending for all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even a life-risking resolve to protect others... crumbles like paper before overwhelming power.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even a life-risking resolve to protect others... crumbles like paper before overwhelming power.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even a life-risking resolve to protect others... crumbles like paper before overwhelming power.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, why did you give my brother and me hope when we were children?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, why did you give my brother and me hope when we were children?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, why did you give my brother and me hope when we were children?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You call the Star Guide a failure... Yet why do you look so heartbroken?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You call the Star Guide a failure... Yet why do you look so heartbroken?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You call the Star Guide a failure... Yet why do you look so heartbroken?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Seems a meaningless act of kindness ended up being your guiding starlight.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Seems a meaningless act of kindness ended up being your guiding starlight.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Seems a meaningless act of kindness ended up being your guiding starlight.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then it's only right that I'm the one to extinguish it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then it's only right that I'm the one to extinguish it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then it's only right that I'm the one to extinguish it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sir Allen, I don't want to fight you!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sir Allen, I don't want to fight you!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sir Allen, I don't want to fight you!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your sword was sharp when we sparred, but now on the battlefield, it's forgotten its purpose.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your sword was sharp when we sparred, but now on the battlefield, it's forgotten its purpose.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your sword was sharp when we sparred, but now on the battlefield, it's forgotten its purpose.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To stand on the field without resolve. Is that what you call <color=#ffd34c>chivalry</color>?
records.m_Talk_DEU: To stand on the field without resolve. Is that what you call <color=#ffd34c>chivalry</color>?
records.m_Talk_FRA: To stand on the field without resolve. Is that what you call <color=#ffd34c>chivalry</color>?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Virgo Sword Draw!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Virgo Sword Draw!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Virgo Sword Draw!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Virgo Sword... isn't responding?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Virgo Sword... isn't responding?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Virgo Sword... isn't responding?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No Star Armament would answer someone with no will to fight, no readiness to sacrifice something.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No Star Armament would answer someone with no will to fight, no readiness to sacrifice something.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No Star Armament would answer someone with no will to fight, no readiness to sacrifice something.

records.m_Talk_ENG: End this. This is the last kindness I can offer you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: End this. This is the last kindness I can offer you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: End this. This is the last kindness I can offer you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No! Even if the Armament doesn't respond, I still have to save you...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: No! Even if the Armament doesn't respond, I still have to save you...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: No! Even if the Armament doesn't respond, I still have to save you...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is this... snow?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is this... snow?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is this... snow?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Snow? In the Sanctuary?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Snow? In the Sanctuary?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Snow? In the Sanctuary?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Announcing to all crew members.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Announcing to all crew members.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Announcing to all crew members.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The stench of smoke. The shouts of our enemies. The agonizing moans of our allies.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The stench of smoke. The shouts of our enemies. The agonizing moans of our allies.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The stench of smoke. The shouts of our enemies. The agonizing moans of our allies.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Today feels like the day when we had to bid farewell to many of our beloved comrades.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Today feels like the day when we had to bid farewell to many of our beloved comrades.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Today feels like the day when we had to bid farewell to many of our beloved comrades.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I hereby announce that we are back in the frontlines of that same day.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I hereby announce that we are back in the frontlines of that same day.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I hereby announce that we are back in the frontlines of that same day.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Shadow Dimension, activate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Shadow Dimension, activate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Shadow Dimension, activate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Our enemies are the <color=#ffd34c>Knights of Redemption</color>, controlled by Nehemoth, the Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Our enemies are the <color=#ffd34c>Knights of Redemption</color>, controlled by Nehemoth, the Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Our enemies are the <color=#ffd34c>Knights of Redemption</color>, controlled by Nehemoth, the Demon Lord.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now is the time to fulfill our mission as an artillery division.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now is the time to fulfill our mission as an artillery division.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now is the time to fulfill our mission as an artillery division.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For the Administration and the world. For yourselves.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For the Administration and the world. For yourselves.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For the Administration and the world. For yourselves.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And... for our brave comrades, who have fought until their very last breath.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And... for our brave comrades, who have fought until their very last breath.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And... for our brave comrades, who have fought until their very last breath.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We shall present our enemies with a blizzard of steel.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We shall present our enemies with a blizzard of steel.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We shall present our enemies with a blizzard of steel.
